use_cases: Hero section banners with animated brand messaging or taglines
Promotional text displays with continuous scrolling animation
Loading or processing indicators with stylized visual feedback
Decorative text sections in landing pages and marketing sites
Header elements with continuous branding or announcement text
ai_summary: A minimalist animated marquee component that displays continuously scrolling text with a distinctive gooey visual effect. The effect is achieved through layered text with CSS contrast and blur filters, creating a liquid-like appearance where text segments merge and separate. Supports dark and light mode with inverse color schemes. Ideal for hero sections, promotional banners, and branding displays in SaaS, media, and e-commerce contexts.
